title: Petface Embossed Paw Ceramic Cat Bowl for Feeding and Watering, White, 13 cm (Pack of 1)
features: STYLISH DESIGN: Features an embossed paw print design on a white ceramic bowl for a chic pet accessory
PRACTICALITY: Perfect size for feeding and watering your cat, keeping their water cool and food fresh throughout the day
DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Heavy enough not to tip over, the dishwasher and microwave safe bowl is easy to clean for convenient daily use
HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: Made from high-quality ceramic material that ensures long-lasting durability and a modern look in your home decor
PET-FRIENDLY FEATURES: Designed with your furry friend in mind, this cat bowl is comfortable for your pet while also adding style to your feeding area
description: From the manufacturer Petface Cat Bowls – Quality, Comfort & Style for Every Mealtime Make feeding time a pleasure with a Petface Cat Bowl – designed to combine practicality with personality. Whether you're serving food or water, Petface bowls offer a reliable, stylish solution that suits both your cat's needs and your home décor. Key Features: Durable Materials: Crafted from high-quality ceramic, melamine, or plastic for long-lasting use and easy cleaning. Comfortable Design: Shaped to suit cats of all sizes, with low sides or gentle curves that make eating and drinking easy and enjoyable. Non-Slip Stability: Many bowls feature rubber bases or weighted construction to help prevent tipping or sliding. Attractive Styles: Choose from modern colours, playful patterns, and charming embossed designs that add a touch of character to your pet’s feeding area. Versatile Use: Suitable for wet or dry food and water – perfect for daily meals or special treats. With Petface, you can expect a cat bowl that’s as functional as it is stylish – a smart addition to any feline-friendly home.
